query:
-- Fix homeBookSpread: positive values missing +
UPDATE games SET homeBookSpread = CONCAT('+', homeBookSpread)
WHERE sport = 'MLB' AND gameDate IN ('2026-03-25','2026-03-26')
  AND homeBookSpread IS NOT NULL
  AND homeBookSpread NOT LIKE '-%'
  AND homeBookSpread NOT LIKE '+%';

-- Fix awayBookSpread: positive values missing +
UPDATE games SET awayBookSpread = CONCAT('+', awayBookSpread)
WHERE sport = 'MLB' AND gameDate IN ('2026-03-25','2026-03-26')
  AND awayBookSpread IS NOT NULL
  AND awayBookSpread NOT LIKE '-%'
  AND awayBookSpread NOT LIKE '+%';

-- Fix openHomeSpread: positive values missing +
UPDATE games SET openHomeSpread = CONCAT('+', openHomeSpread)
WHERE sport = 'MLB' AND gameDate IN ('2026-03-25','2026-03-26')
  AND openHomeSpread IS NOT NULL
  AND openHomeSpread NOT LIKE '-%'
  AND openHomeSpread NOT LIKE '+%';

-- Fix openAwaySpread: positive values missing +

WHERE sport = 'MLB' AND gameDate IN ('2026-03-25','2026-03-26')
  AND openAwaySpread IS NOT NULL
  AND openAwaySpread NOT LIKE '-%'
  AND openAwaySpread NOT LIKE '+%';

-- Fix openAwaySpreadOdds: TB@STL had "142" missing +
UPDATE games SET openAwaySpreadOdds = CONCAT('+', openAwaySpreadOdds)
WHERE sport = 'MLB' AND gameDate IN ('2026-03-25','2026-03-26')
  AND openAwaySpreadOdds IS NOT NULL
  AND openAwaySpreadOdds NOT LIKE '-%'
  AND openAwaySpreadOdds NOT LIKE '+%';

-- Fix openHomeML: TB@STL had "106" missing +
UPDATE games SET openHomeML = CONCAT('+', openHomeML)
WHERE sport = 'MLB' AND gameDate IN ('2026-03-25','2026-03-26')
  AND openHomeML IS NOT NULL
  AND openHomeML NOT LIKE '-%'
  AND openHomeML NOT LIKE '+%';
